title: dForge Entity Definition
description: Defines an entity (table/view mapping) for a dForge module

extends.description: Qualified entity code of the target entity to extend, as '<module>.<entity>' (e.g. 'fin.invoice' or 'cdy-tax.tax_invoice_issued_line'). The module part may contain hyphens (module codes are hyphenated, e.g. 'crm-fin'); the entity part is snake_case. When set, this entity definition adds columns to an existing entity owned by another module instead of creating a new entity. Physical columns are stored in a 1:1 extension table.

schema.description: Database schema name override (defaults to module schema)

dbObject.description: Database table or view name (defaults to entity code)

isView.description: When true, entity maps to a SQL view (read-only, no DDL generation). Default: false (table-backed).

viewSql.description: SQL SELECT statement for view-backed entities (isView=true). Executed as CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW during module install.

toString.description: Display pattern using column placeholders, e.g. "{first_name} {last_name}". Optional in extension entities (with `extends`). No `type` constraint here because `toString` collides with Object.prototype.toString in JSON validators — they read the inherited function and reject it, even when the property is absent from the JSON.

traits.description: Entity traits expanded during module install (authoring shortcut). Trait definitions loaded from DB (seeded by metadata module).

fields.description: Column definitions keyed by column code. Column codes must start with a letter or underscore and contain only letters, digits, and underscores — a leading `-` is reserved for the sort descending prefix in `view_json.order`.

references.description: Foreign key reference definitions (legacy format, prefer 'link' on field)

numberSequence.description: Automatic document numbering configuration for this entity

accumulation.description: Accumulation registry configuration (simple document without lines). Requires 'accumulation' trait.

params.description: Entity-level parameters for platform behavior flags

restricted.description: When true, blocks generic data.get/data.set access. Entity must be accessed via dedicated API methods.

dbDatatype.description: PostgreSQL data type (e.g. uuid, varchar, int4, bool, text, json, numeric, date, timestamp, timestamptz, bpchar)

baseDatatypeCd.description: Base data type code from field_type table (e.g. string, number, boolean, date, time, timestamp, json, binary)

columnType.description: Column type: D=Data (physical column), R=Reference (N:1 lookup), S=Set (1:N collection), F=Formula (virtual calculated), G=Generated/Computed (physical, auto-maintained), A=Accumulation registry, L=Ledger registry

fieldTypeCd.description: UI field type code from field_type table

flags.description: Display flags: V=Visible, I=Identity, E=Editable, M=Mandatory, H=Hidden

isPk.description: Whether this column is part of the primary key

isNullable.description: Whether the column allows NULL values

isIdentity.description: Whether the column value is auto-generated (e.g. CUID primary key). Identity columns are not editable and excluded from required validation.

formula.description: Formula expression (for columnType 'F' or default values)

params.description: Field-type-specific configuration (e.g. dropdown options, currency settings)

label.description: Display text. Optional — the runtime falls back to `value` when omitted (column.ts: label = o.label ?? value).

link.description: Relationship link for Reference (R) and Set (S) columns

cyclic.description: On a self-referencing reference column (R column whose link.entity is the owning entity), set true to ALLOW parent/child cycles. When absent the self-reference is treated as an acyclic hierarchy and DB-level guards reject loops. Ignored on non-self-referencing columns.

domain.description: Reference to a reusable column domain, qualified as 'module_cd.domain_cd' (unqualified resolves within this module, then tenant-created domains). The domain supplies dbDatatype, baseDatatypeCd, fieldTypeCd, maxLen, precision and params; declaring any of those alongside 'domain' is rejected at install. The column keeps its own description, flags, orderNum, isNullable and isPk.

refFilter.description: Filter criteria for reference lookups. Condition values support @[field] placeholders resolved against the current record at lookup time (e.g. {"c":"channel","o":"eq","v":"@[channel]"} narrows options to rows matching the record's own channel); a condition whose placeholder is unset is dropped rather than matching nothing.

oneOf.title: Domain-backed column
oneOf.description: Physical column whose datatype, control, sizing and options all come from a reusable column domain. Requires 'domain' and must NOT restate what the domain owns.

oneOf.title: Data column
oneOf.description: Physical DB column (columnType 'D' or unspecified). Requires 'dbDatatype'. Must NOT have 'link'.

oneOf.title: Inferred-type column
oneOf.description: Physical column where dbDatatype is inferred from fieldTypeCd (e.g. user, color)

oneOf.title: Reference column (R)
oneOf.description: N:1 lookup (columnType 'R'). Requires 'link' and 'fieldTypeCd'. Must NOT have 'dbDatatype'.

oneOf.title: Set column (S)
oneOf.description: 1:N collection (columnType 'S'). Requires 'link' and 'fieldTypeCd'. Must NOT have 'dbDatatype'.

oneOf.title: Formula column (F)
oneOf.description: Calculated virtual column (columnType 'F'). Requires 'formula'. Must NOT have 'link' or 'dbDatatype'.

oneOf.title: Accumulation registry column (A)
oneOf.description: Accumulation registry state (bool) + config. Physical column storing posted state. Config in params defines balance entity, dimensions, resources.

oneOf.title: Ledger registry column (L)
oneOf.description: Ledger registry state (bool) + config. Physical column storing posted state. Config in params defines lines, movement entity, balance entity.

oneOf.title: Generated/Computed column (G)
oneOf.description: Physical column auto-computed by DB trigger (aggregate over child set) or PostgreSQL GENERATED ALWAYS AS (same-row expression). Requires 'dbDatatype' and 'formula'. Formula syntax: SUM([setCol].[childField]) for aggregates, or plain SQL expression for same-row generated columns.

fieldLink.description: Relationship definition for Reference and Set columns

entity.description: Target entity code (the entity being referenced or collected)

thisKey.description: Column(s) in this entity (comma-separated for compound keys)

otherKey.description: Column(s) in the target entity (comma-separated for compound keys)

serverDefault.description: Platform-computed value filled server-side on write (used by the audit / audit-full traits). Resolved by the write pipeline (data.insert/update and DSL insert/update) — not a formula.

value.description: Whitelisted server-context expression: now() → transaction clock, currentUser() → caller's user id.

on.description: Phase(s) in which the value is applied. 'save' = both insert and update.

ifEmpty.description: When true, only fill if the caller did not provide a value; when false (default), always override.

numberSequence.description: Automatic document numbering. Auto-generates a formatted number on INSERT when the target column is empty.

column.description: Column code that receives the auto-generated number

prefixSettingCd.description: Module setting code to resolve the prefix from (folder-scoped inheritance)

defaultPrefix.description: Fallback prefix when no setting is configured

periodConfig.description: Configuration for entities with the 'period' trait. Defines how date values map to period keys.

keyFormat.description: Format string for deriving period key from a date. Placeholders: {yyyy}, {yy}, {MM}, {dd}, {q} (quarter 1-4).

accumulationConfig.description: Configuration for simple accumulation (document without lines, e.g. receipt → stock).

dimensions.description: Balance row lookup dimensions. Array of field names (same name on both entities) or object mapping balance_field → document_field.

resources.description: Document field → balance field resource mappings

sign.description: Dynamic sign based on a field value (alternative to direction)

signConfig.description: Dynamic sign determination based on a field value

ledgerRegistryEntry.description: Single registry target within an L-column's registries array

onDelete.description: FK ON DELETE behaviour. Default (omitted) = noAction (plain FK). 'cascade' deletes children with the parent; 'setNull' nulls the FK column (must be nullable).

onUpdate.description: FK ON UPDATE behaviour. Default (omitted) = noAction. Fires when a parent's key value changes — a no-op for immutable cuid PKs, but useful for entities keyed on a natural/mutable PK.
